text:
### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The customer retention platform connects with a customer lifetime value prediction system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Customer Retention Platform Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the customer retention platform with the customer lifetime value prediction system.

### Technical Description
The integration will involve establishing a secure connection between the two systems, allowing for seamless data exchange and triggering of retention strategies based on predicted customer lifetime value.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement the integration architecture.
- [ ] Develop and test the API endpoints for data exchange.
- [ ] Implement authentication and authorization mechanisms.
- [ ] Test the integration with various scenarios and edge cases.

", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The travel management software features a trip expense reporting system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Trip Expense Reporting System", "body": "### Objective
Implement a trip expense reporting system for the travel management software.

### Technical Description
The system should allow employees to report expenses related to business trips, including receipts and descriptions. The system should also include features for expense categorization, approval, and reimbursement.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the database schema for expense reporting
- [ ] Implement the expense reporting UI for employees
- [ ] Develop the expense approval workflow
- [ ] Integrate the expense reporting system with the company's accounting system", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The network access control software integrates with a user authentication system.

### Response:
[{"title": "API Integration with User Authentication System", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the network access control software with a user authentication system.

### Technical Description
The integration will require establishing a secure connection between the network access control software and the user authentication system. This will enable the network access control software to authenticate user requests and authorize access to network resources.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the API endpoint architecture for the integration.
- [ ] Implement the API endpoint connections using the chosen programming language.
- [ ] Test the API endpoint connections for security and functionality.
- [ ] Integrate the API endpoints with the user authentication system.
- [ ] Conduct thorough testing of the integrated system to ensure proper functioning and security.

Labels: [backend, api]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The software license management tool connects with a compliance monitoring system.

### Response:
[{"title": "License Management API", "body": "### Objective
Develop a RESTful API to connect with a compliance monitoring system for software license management.

### Technical Description
The API will be built using [Backend Technology] and will interact with the compliance monitoring system using [API/Protocol]. The API will handle [list specific functionality, e.g. creating, updating, deleting licenses].

### Tasks
- [ ] Design API architecture and define API endpoints.
- [ ] Implement API using [Backend Technology].
- [ ] Integrate API with compliance monitoring system.
- [ ] Test API functionality and performance.", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The mobile advertising platform features a user acquisition tracking system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Mobile Advertising Platform: User Acquisition Tracking System", "body": "### Objetivo
Implementar um sistema de rastreamento de aquisições de usuários para a plataforma de publicidade móvel.

### Descrição Técnica
O sistema deve ser capaz de armazenar e processar dados de aquisições de usuários, incluindo informações sobre campanhas, anúncios e clics. Deve ser integrado com a API da plataforma de publicidade móvel e ser capaz de fornecer relatórios personalizados para os clientes.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design e implementação da API para o sistema de rastreamento de aquisições de usuários.
- [ ] Implementação do banco de dados para armazenar os dados de aquisições de usuários.
- [ ] Desenvolvimento de relatórios personalizados para os clientes.
- [ ] Integração com a API da plataforma de publicidade móvel.
- [ ] Testes de unidade e integração do sistema.", "labels": ["backend", "api", "database"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The IT asset management platform integrates with a hardware inventory system.

### Response:
[{"title": "API Integration with Hardware Inventory System", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the IT asset management platform with a hardware inventory system to enable accurate tracking and reporting of IT assets.

### Technical Description
The integration will involve developing APIs to exchange data between the two systems. The APIs will need to handle data validation, error handling, and logging.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement API endpoints for data exchange.
- [ ] Implement data validation and error handling for API requests.
- [ ] Integrate with hardware inventory system using APIs.
- [ ] Test API integrations for correctness and performance.

Labels: [backend, api]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Hardware Inventory System Integration Requirements", "body": "### Objective
Define the requirements for integrating the IT asset management platform with a hardware inventory system.

### Technical Description
This issue aims to gather information on the hardware inventory system's APIs, data formats, and any specific requirements for the integration.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research hardware inventory system's APIs and data formats.
- [ ] Identify specific requirements for the integration (e.g., authentication, data validation).
- [ ] Document findings and requirements.

Labels: [backend, api]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "IT Asset Management Platform Architecture", "body": "### Objective
Define the architecture for the IT asset management platform to integrate with a hardware inventory system.

### Technical Description
This issue aims to outline the high-level architecture for the platform, including the components, APIs, and data flows.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the architecture for the platform.
- [ ] Identify the necessary components and APIs.
- [ ] Define data flows and interactions between components.

Labels: [architecture, backend]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The online voting software connects with a voter authentication system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integração com Sistema de Autenticação de Votos", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrar o software de votação online com o sistema de autenticação de votos para garantir a segurança e confiabilidade do processo de votação.

### Descrição Técnica
A integração será feita utilizando APIs RESTful e autenticação JWT. O software de votação online precisará ser configurado para enviar requisições de autenticação para o sistema de autenticação de votos e receber as respostas de autenticação para validar as informações do votante.

### Tasks
- [ ] Revisar a documentação do sistema de autenticação de votos para entender as requisições e respostas necessárias para a integração.
- [ ] Implementar a integração com o sistema de autenticação de votos utilizando APIs RESTful e autenticação JWT.
- [ ] Testar a integração com diferentes cenários de votação para garantir a segurança e confiabilidade do processo.

labels: [backend, api]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The e-commerce analytics platform features a sales forecasting system.

### Response:
[{"title": "E-commerce Analytics Platform - Sales Forecasting System", "body": "### Objetivo
Develop a sales forecasting system for an e-commerce analytics platform, providing accurate predictions for merchants.

### Descrição Técnica
The system will utilize historical sales data, seasonality, and trends to generate forecasts. It will also integrate with the existing analytics platform to provide a unified view of sales performance.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the sales forecasting algorithm
- [ ] Integrate with existing analytics platform API
- [ ] Implement seasonality and trend analysis
- [ ] Develop a web interface for users to view and compare forecasts", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "E-commerce Analytics Platform - Data Ingestion", "body": "### Objetivo
Design and implement a data ingestion system for the e-commerce analytics platform, allowing for seamless integration with various data sources.

### Descrição Técnica
The system will utilize APIs, data feeds, and file imports to collect sales data from various sources, such as marketplaces, payment gateways, and POS systems.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design data ingestion architecture
- [ ] Implement API integrations with marketplaces and payment gateways
- [ ] Develop file import functionality for POS systems
- [ ] Integrate with existing analytics platform data storage", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "E-commerce Analytics Platform - Data Processing", "body": "### Objetivo
Develop a data processing system for the e-commerce analytics platform, ensuring efficient and accurate processing of sales data.

### Descrição Técnica
The system will utilize ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) processes to cleanse, transform, and load sales data into the analytics platform.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design ETL processes for data transformation
- [ ] Implement data quality control mechanisms
- [ ] Develop data load functionality for the analytics platform
- [ ] Optimize data processing for scalability and performance", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Input:
The product information management tool integrates with a product taxonomy system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Product Information Management Tool Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the product information management tool with the product taxonomy system.

### Description
The integration will enable the product information management tool to retrieve and update product information from the product taxonomy system.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research and identify the API endpoints and data structures of the product taxonomy system.
- [ ] Develop a RESTful API to integrate the product information management tool with the product taxonomy system.
- [ ] Implement data validation and error handling for the API interactions.
- [ ] Test the API integration with the product taxonomy system.
- [ ] Document the API integration and its usage.

Labels: [backend, api]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Response:
[{"title": "Content Calendar System", "body": "### Objective

### Technical Description
The system should allow users to schedule and organize their content across multiple social media platforms. It should also provide a calendar view to help users plan and visualize their content strategy.

### Tasks

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The salesforce automation software integrates with a lead routing system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integrate Salesforce with Lead Routing System", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the Salesforce automation software with the lead routing system to enable seamless data exchange and automation of lead management processes.

### Technical Description
The integration will involve establishing a secure API connection between the Salesforce platform and the lead routing system. This will enable the exchange of lead data and automate the routing process.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement the API connection between Salesforce and the lead routing system.
- [ ] Develop a data mapping strategy to ensure accurate and efficient data exchange.
- [ ] Configure and test the API connection to ensure seamless data transfer and automation of lead management processes.

", "labels": ["integration", "api", "backend"]}, {"title": "Lead Routing System API Development", "body": "### Objective
Develop a robust and scalable API for the lead routing system to enable seamless integration with the Salesforce automation software.

### Technical Description
The API will be built using a scalable technology stack (e.g., Node.js, Python) and will include endpoints for lead routing, status updates, and data retrieval.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and develop the API endpoints for lead routing and status updates.
- [ ] Implement data validation and error handling mechanisms to ensure API stability and reliability.
- [ ] Conduct thorough testing and validation of the API to ensure compatibility with the Salesforce platform.

", "labels": ["api", "backend", "devops"]}, {"title": "Salesforce Integration Testing", "body": "### Objective
Conduct thorough testing of the Salesforce automation software integration with the lead routing system to ensure seamless data exchange and automation of lead management processes.

### Technical Description
Testing will involve simulating various scenarios, such as lead generation, routing, and status updates, to validate the integration's functionality and performance.

### Tasks
- [ ] Develop test scenarios and test cases to validate the integration's functionality and performance.
- [ ] Execute testing and validate the results to ensure the integration meets the required standards.
- [ ] Document testing results and provide recommendations for future testing and improvement.

", "labels": ["testing", "integration", "backend"]}]

### Instruction:

### Input:
The workflow automation tool connects with a task prioritization system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integração com sistema de priorização de tarefas", "body": "### Objetivo
Automatizar workflow com o sistema de priorização de tarefas.

### Descrição Técnica
Desenvolver API que permita a comunicação entre o workflow automation tool e o sistema de priorização de tarefas, permitindo a integração de dados e a atualização dinâmica.

### Tasks
- [ ] Desenvolver API com endpoints para cadastrar e atualizar prioridades de tarefas.
- [ ] Implementar validações para garantir a integridade dos dados.
- [ ] Testar API para garantir a estabilidade e a escalabilidade.

", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Workflow automation tool integration", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrar workflow automation tool com sistema de priorização de tarefas.

### Descrição Técnica
Desenvolver lógica de negócios para automatizar workflows com base nas prioridades definidas pelo sistema.

### Tasks
- [ ] Desenvolver lógica de negócios para automatizar workflows.
- [ ] Implementar trigger para disparar workflows com base em prioridades.
- [ ] Testar workflows para garantir a integridade e a escalabilidade.

", "labels": ["backend", "workflow"]}, {"title": "Priorization system API documentation", "body": "### Objetivo
Criar documentação para API do sistema de priorização de tarefas.

### Descrição Técnica
Desenvolver documentação para API, incluindo endpoints, parâmetros, respostas e exemplos de uso.

### Tasks
- [ ] Criar documentação para API.
- [ ] Testar documentação para garantir a precisão e a clareza.
- [ ] Publicar documentação para acesso público.

", "labels": ["docs", "api"]}]

### Instruction:

### Input:
The electronic data interchange software features a data format conversion system.

### Response:
[{"title": "EDX Data Format Conversion", "body": "### Objective
Convert electronic data interchange (EDX) data formats to enable seamless integration with various systems.

### Technical Description
The system must be able to read and write EDX data formats, including [list specific formats, e.g. EDIFACT, XBRL, etc.]. The conversion process should be efficient and scalable to handle large volumes of data.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement the data format conversion system using [specific programming language or framework, e.g. Python, Java, etc.].", "labels": ["backend", "api", "integration"]}, {"title": "EDX Data Format Support", "body": "### Objective
Extend the data format conversion system to support additional EDX data formats.

### Technical Description
The system must be able to read and write additional EDX data formats, including [list specific formats, e.g. EDIFACT, XBRL, etc.]. The conversion process should be efficient and scalable to handle large volumes of data.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research and identify additional EDX data formats to be supported.
- [ ] Implement support for the additional formats.", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "EDX Data Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the data format conversion system with other systems to enable seamless data exchange.

### Technical Description
The system must be able to integrate with [list specific systems, e.g. CRM, ERP, etc.]. The integration should be bidirectional, allowing for data to be read and written from/to these systems.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement the integration with [specific system, e.g. CRM].", "labels": ["integration", "backend", "api"]}]

### Input:

### Response:
[{"title": "Integração com Data Preprocessing System", "body": "### Objetivo

### Descrição Técnica

### Tasks

- [ ] Implementar um mecanismo de autenticação e autorização para a API.
- [ ] Testar a integração com diferentes conjuntos de dados.
- [ ] Implementar logs e métricas para monitorar a performance da integração.

Labels: backend, api, integration", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Input:

### Response:
[{"title": "Implement Time Management System", "body": "### Objective
Design and implement a time management system that allows users to track and organize their daily tasks and activities.

### Technical Description
The system will include features such as task scheduling, time tracking, and reminders.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design database schema for time management system
- [ ] Implement task scheduling algorithm
- [ ] Develop user interface for time tracking and reminders", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Integrate with Calendar System", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the time management system with a calendar system to allow users to schedule tasks and events.

### Technical Description
The integration will involve API calls to the calendar system to retrieve and update schedules.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research and select a calendar API to integrate with
- [ ] Implement API calls to retrieve and update schedules
- [ ] Test integration with various calendar systems", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Implement Reminders and Notifications", "body": "### Objective
Implement a reminder and notification system that sends reminders and notifications to users based on their scheduled tasks and events.

### Technical Description
The system will use a combination of database queries and API calls to retrieve and send reminders and notifications.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement reminder and notification system
- [ ] Test reminders and notifications with various schedules and event types", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Input:
The supply chain management software integrates with a demand planning system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integración con sistema de planeación de demanda", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrar la aplicación de gestión de cadena de suministro con el sistema de planeación de demanda para mejorar la eficiencia y la precisión en la planificación y seguimiento de pedidos.

### Descrição Técnica
La aplicación debe ser capaz de comunicarse con el sistema de planeación de demanda a través de APIs para obtener y compartir datos relevantes. Debe ser desarrollado en un lenguaje de programación adecuado y debe utilizar un framework adecuado para la integración.

### Tasks
- [ ] Investigar APIs disponibles para la comunicación con el sistema de planeación de demanda
- [ ] Diseñar la arquitectura de la integración
- [ ] Desarrollar la lógica de negocio para la comunicación con el sistema de planeación de demanda
- [ ] Testear la integración para asegurarse de que funcione correctamente
- [ ] Implementar la integración en la aplicación de gestión de cadena de suministro
- [ ] Realizar pruebas de aceptación para verificar que la integración cumpla con los requisitos

Labels: [backend, api]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Input:
The retail management software connects with a customer loyalty program system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integrate with Customer Loyalty Program", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the retail management software with a customer loyalty program system to enhance customer experience and loyalty.

### Technical Description
The integration will require API connections and data exchange between the two systems. The retail management software will need to send and receive data such as customer information, purchase history, and loyalty points.

### Tasks
- [ ] Conduct API analysis and design for integration.
- [ ] Implement API connections and data exchange mechanisms.
- [ ] Test and validate the integration with the customer loyalty program system.", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Retail Management Software Architecture", "body": "### Objective
Define the architecture for the retail management software to ensure scalability, security, and maintainability.

### Technical Description
The architecture will need to consider the integration with the customer loyalty program system, as well as other systems such as inventory management and sales analytics. The architecture will require a robust backend, a scalable database, and a secure authentication and authorization mechanism.

### Tasks
- [ ] Conduct architecture analysis and design.
- [ ] Implement the architecture in the retail management software.", "labels": ["architecture", "backend"]}]

### Input:
The text analysis software integrates with a keyword extraction system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integração com sistema de extração de palavras-chave", "body": "### Objetivo

### Descrição Técnica
